import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { ClipboardList, Truck, ArrowRight } from "lucide-react"; import { useData } from "../contexts/DataContext"; export default function Dashboard() { const { orders } = useData(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const pending = orders.filter((o) => !o.verified).length; const ongoing = 156; const recent = orders.slice(0, 3); return (
{/* Header */}
OVERVIEW

Dashboard Admin

{/* Stat Cards */}
{/* Pending - Light */}
PRIORITAS
{pending}
Pesanan Tertunda
Menunggu verifikasi admin
{/* Ongoing - Dark */}
AKTIF
{ongoing}
Pengiriman Berjalan
Distribusi aktif nasional
{/* Recent Orders */}
{/* Table Top Bar */}
TERBARU

Pesanan Terbaru

{/* Column Headers */}
{['ID Pesanan', 'Tujuan', 'Nama Pelanggan', 'No Telephone', 'Tindakan'].map((col) => (
{col}
))}
{/* Rows */}
{recent.map((o) => (
#{o.id}
{o.cargoType} • {o.weight}
{o.destination}
{o.destLabel}
{o.initials}
{o.customer}
{o.phone}
))}
); }
